zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Arundel於1387年出生在英國時，她的父親Ranulph FitzAlan29歲，母親Juliana Krynge27歲。她於大約1410年與Bartholomew Collingridge在英國英格蘭奧可福爾坦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年4月11日在英國哈普爾維古姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Arundel于1387年出生在英国时，她的父亲Ranulph FitzAlan29岁，母亲Juliana Krynge27岁。她于大约1410年与Bartholomew Collingridge在英国英格兰奧可福爾坦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年4月11日在英国哈普爾維古姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Arundel was born in 1387, in England, her father, Ranulph FitzAlan, was 29 and her mother, Juliana Krynge, was 27. She married Bartholomew Collingridge about 1410, in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 11 April 1447, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Arundel est née en 1387, à Angleterre, son père, Ranulph FitzAlan, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Juliana Krynge, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Bartholomew Collingridge environ 1410, à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1447, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Arundel 1387 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph FitzAlan 29 und ihre Mutter Juliana Krynge 27. Sie hat um 1410 in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Bartholomew Collingridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1447 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Arundel è nata il nel 1387 nel England, sua padre, Ranulph FitzAlan, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Juliana Krynge, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Bartholomew Collingridge circa 1410, nel Thame, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 aprile 1447, nel Winchester, Hampshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Arundelが1387年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Ranulph FitzAlanは29歳，母Juliana Kryngeは27歳であった。約1410年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムでBartholomew Collingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年4月11日にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Arundel(이)가 1387년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph FitzAlan(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana Krynge(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 섬에서 Bartholomew Collingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 4월 11일 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Arundel nasceu em 1387, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph FitzAlan, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Krynge, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Bartholomew Collingridge aproximadamente 1410, em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1447, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Arundel родилась в 1387 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulph FitzAlan было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Krynge, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomew Collingridge около 1410 г. в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 апреля 1447 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Arundel nació en 1387, en Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph FitzAlan, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Juliana Krynge, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Bartholomew Collingridge aproximadamente 1410, en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de abril de 1447, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
